comment: Network meta-analysis of disease-modifying therapy CLASSES for all-cause mortality in heart failure, versus placebo. Inspired by the AACT-powered NMA examples in trialforge (github.com/mahmood726-cyber/trialforge); reproduced here as a self-auditing capsule on the warehouse snapshot. Nodes without a usable mortality contrast drop out of the network automatically.

pico.population: heart failure with reduced ejection fraction

primary_estimand: hazard ratio for all-cause mortality versus placebo
